## @jgengine/core/world/terraform

- `EditableTerrain` (interface): interface EditableTerrain extends TerrainField тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `EditableTerrainConfig` (interface): interface EditableTerrainConfig тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `SurfaceDelta` (interface): interface SurfaceDelta тАФ A compact record of the surface-material cells a paint stroke touched: parallel `indices`/`before`/`after` arrays into the per-cell surface grid. One per stroke keeps paint undo history small.
- `SurfaceDeltaRecorder` (type): type SurfaceDeltaRecorder = (index: number, before: string | null, after: string | null) => void тАФ Reports each changed cell during a recorded paint: grid index, prior surface id, new surface id.
- `SurfaceStroke` (interface): interface SurfaceStroke тАФ Accumulates a whole paint drag тАФ many surface stamps тАФ into one compact {@link SurfaceDelta}. Keeps each cell's first `before` and latest `after`, so undo replays the paint as a single step.
- `TerraformBrush` (interface): interface TerraformBrush тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `TerraformBrushConfig` (interface): interface TerraformBrushConfig тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `TerraformDelta` (interface): interface TerraformDelta тАФ A compact record of the vertices a sculpt stroke touched: parallel `indices`/`before`/`after` arrays into the offset grid. Storing one of these per stroke keeps undo history small тАФ the whole terrain document is never copied.
- `TerraformDeltaRecorder` (type): type TerraformDeltaRecorder = (index: number, before: number, after: number) => void тАФ Reports each changed vertex during a recorded edit: grid index, prior offset, new offset.
- `TerraformEdit` (interface): interface TerraformEdit тАФ A single sculpt stamp: which brush, where, and its shaping parameters.
- `TerraformFalloff` (type): type TerraformFalloff = "smooth" | "linear" | "none" тАФ How a brush's strength fades from its center to its rim.
- `TerraformHeightLimit` (interface): interface TerraformHeightLimit тАФ Clamp bounds applied to the resulting terrain height after a heightfield edit.
- `TerraformMode` (type): type TerraformMode = "raise" | "lower" | "smooth" | "flatten" | "noise" | "ramp" | "paint" тАФ A sculpt operation kind: heightfield brushes plus the surface-paint brush.
- `TerraformShape` (type): type TerraformShape = "circle" | "square" тАФ A brush footprint: a round disc or an axis-aligned square.
- `TerraformSnapshot` (interface): interface TerraformSnapshot тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `TerraformStroke` (interface): interface TerraformStroke тАФ Accumulates a whole drag тАФ many brush stamps тАФ into one compact {@link TerraformDelta}. Keeps each vertex's first `before` and latest `after`, so undo replays the stroke as a single step even though the pointer fired dozens of moves.
- `TerrainSurfaceRule` (interface): interface TerrainSurfaceRule тАФ A height/slope predicate for auto-painting a surface layer (e.g. rock on steep slopes, snow up high).
- `applyDeltaToSnapshot` (function): function applyDeltaToSnapshot(snapshot: TerraformSnapshot, delta: TerraformDelta): TerraformSnapshot тАФ Returns a new snapshot with a delta's `after` offsets applied (copy-on-write тАФ inputs untouched).
- `applySurfaceDeltaToSnapshot` (function): function applySurfaceDeltaToSnapshot(snapshot: TerraformSnapshot, delta: SurfaceDelta): TerraformSnapshot тАФ Returns a new snapshot with a surface delta's `after` ids applied (copy-on-write).
- `beginSurfaceStroke` (function): function beginSurfaceStroke(terrain: Pick<EditableTerrain, "paintRecording">): SurfaceStroke тАФ Opens a paint-stroke recorder over `terrain`; stamp paint edits into it, then read one net delta.
- `beginTerraformStroke` (function): function beginTerraformStroke(terrain: Pick<EditableTerrain, "applyRecording">): TerraformStroke тАФ Opens a stroke recorder over `terrain`; stamp edits into it, then read one net delta.
- `brushWeight` (function): function brushWeight(distance: number, radius: number, falloff: TerraformFalloff): number тАФ Smooth/linear/hard brush weight for a sample `distance` from the brush center.
- `createEditableTerrain` (function): function createEditableTerrain(config: EditableTerrainConfig): EditableTerrain тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `createTerraformBrush` (function): function createTerraformBrush(terrain: Pick<EditableTerrain, "apply">, config: TerraformBrushConfig = {}): TerraformBrush тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `createTerrainSnapshot` (function): function createTerrainSnapshot(config: EditableTerrainConfig): TerraformSnapshot тАФ A fresh, unedited terrain snapshot sized to `bounds`/`cellSize` тАФ the seed for a new sculpt document.
- `editableTerrainFromSnapshot` (function): function editableTerrainFromSnapshot(snapshot: TerraformSnapshot, base?: TerrainField): EditableTerrain тАФ Rebuilds a live {@link EditableTerrain} from a snapshot, layered over `base` ground.
- `revertDeltaFromSnapshot` (function): function revertDeltaFromSnapshot(snapshot: TerraformSnapshot, delta: TerraformDelta): TerraformSnapshot тАФ Returns a new snapshot with a delta's `before` offsets restored (copy-on-write undo).
- `revertSurfaceDeltaFromSnapshot` (function): function revertSurfaceDeltaFromSnapshot(snapshot: TerraformSnapshot, delta: SurfaceDelta): TerraformSnapshot тАФ Returns a new snapshot with a surface delta's `before` ids restored (copy-on-write undo).

## @jgengine/core/world/terrain

- `ARENA_WATER_LEVEL` (const): const ARENA_WATER_LEVEL: -0.9 тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `ArenaFieldConfig` (interface): interface ArenaFieldConfig тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `BiomeFogValue` (interface): interface BiomeFogValue тАФ A concrete fog look тАФ the shape `createBiomeFogSampler` resolves per z from a band's `fog` over the base fog.
- `BiomeSkyValue` (interface): interface BiomeSkyValue тАФ A concrete sky look тАФ the shape `createBiomeSkySampler` resolves per z from a band's `sky` over the base sky.
- `DEFAULT_MAX_WALK_SLOPE` (const): const DEFAULT_MAX_WALK_SLOPE: 0.6 тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `DEFAULT_TERRAIN_MATERIAL` (const): const DEFAULT_TERRAIN_MATERIAL: TerrainMaterial тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `FLAT_FIELD` (const): const FLAT_FIELD: TerrainField тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `FractalNoiseConfig` (interface): interface FractalNoiseConfig тАФ Octave settings for {@link fractalNoise}: frequency, layering, and optional ridged shaping.
- `GroundSnapEntityStore` (interface): interface GroundSnapEntityStore тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `GroundSnapTarget` (interface): interface GroundSnapTarget тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `HeightMapFieldConfig` (interface): interface HeightMapFieldConfig тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `ISLAND_VOID_HEIGHT` (const): const ISLAND_VOID_HEIGHT: -256 тАФ Ground height between islands when no base terrain exists тАФ deep enough to read as a fall into the void, finite so physics stays sane.
- `NoiseFieldConfig` (interface): interface NoiseFieldConfig тАФ Configuration for {@link noiseField}: seed, amplitude, and fractal noise shaping.
- `ResolvedTerrainDetail` (type): type ResolvedTerrainDetail = Required<Omit<TerrainDetailConfig, "waterLevel">> & { waterLevel: number } тАФ A {@link TerrainDetailConfig} with every field resolved to a concrete value тАФ the shape the shell's detail material consumes.
- `RollingFieldConfig` (interface): interface RollingFieldConfig тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `TERRAIN_MATERIAL_PALETTES` (const): const TERRAIN_MATERIAL_PALETTES: Record<TerrainMaterial, TerrainPalette> тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `TerrainField` (interface): interface TerrainField тАФ A sampleable ground surface: height and normal at any x/z, with optional bounds and water level.
- `TerrainNormal` (type): type TerrainNormal = readonly [number, number, number] тАФ A surface normal vector at a terrain sample point.
- `TerrainPalette` (interface): interface TerrainPalette тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `TerrainSlopeSample` (interface): interface TerrainSlopeSample тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `arenaField` (function): function arenaField(config: ArenaFieldConfig = {}): TerrainField тАФ Builds a `TerrainField` with a flat spawn plateau, rolling hills, and a basin, for combat arenas.
- `composeIslandFields` (function): function composeIslandFields(base: TerrainField | null, islands: readonly TerrainIslandDescriptor[], voidHeight = ISLAND_VOID_HEIGHT): TerrainField тАФ Composes a base terrain and any number of bounded islands into one world field: inside an island's rect the island's own field (sampled in island-local coordinates) wins, elsewhere the base terrain answers, and with no base the gap is `ISLAND_VOID_HEIGHT` void. Later islands win overlaps.
- `createBiomeBandSampler` (function): function createBiomeBandSampler(bands: readonly BiomeBand[], fallback: TerrainPalette): (z: number) => TerrainPalette тАФ Per-z palette sampler over a descriptor's `biomeBands` тАФ ordered zones that cross-fade their ground palette across a `fade`-wide window centered on the midpoint z between adjacent centers. Below the first / above the last band clamps to that band's palette. Returns `fallback` when no bands are declared. Pure math, unit-testable independent of rendering.
- `createBiomeFogSampler` (function): function createBiomeFogSampler(bands: readonly BiomeBand[], fallback: BiomeFogValue): (z: number) => BiomeFogValue тАФ Per-z fog sampler over a descriptor's `biomeBands` тАФ cross-fades each band's `fog` (unset fields falling through to `fallback`) across the same `fade` window as the ground sampler, so fog color and range track the camera's z. Bands with no `fog` resolve to `fallback`. Pure math, unit-testable.
- `createBiomeSkySampler` (function): function createBiomeSkySampler(bands: readonly BiomeBand[], fallback: BiomeSkyValue): (z: number) => BiomeSkyValue тАФ Per-z sky sampler over a descriptor's `biomeBands` тАФ cross-fades each band's `sky` (unset fields falling through to `fallback`) across the same `fade` window as the ground sampler, so horizon/zenith colors and sun/ambient intensity track the camera's z. Bands with no `sky` resolve to `fallback`.
- `createTerrainPaletteSampler` (function): function createTerrainPaletteSampler(descriptor: Pick<TerrainEnvironmentConfig, "material" | "colors" | "materialRegions" | "biomeBands">): (x: number, z: number) => TerrainPalette тАФ Per-position palette sampler over the descriptor's base `material`/`colors` plus its z-ordered `biomeBands` (painted first) and radial `materialRegions` (painted over) тАФ the multi-biome coloring seam. Regions paint fully inside `radius` and blend back across `falloff`; later regions win overlaps.
- `flatField` (function): function flatField(): TerrainField тАФ A flat, zero-height `TerrainField` for arenas with no elevation.
- `fractalNoise` (function): function fractalNoise(x: number, z: number, config: FractalNoiseConfig): number тАФ Layers `valueNoise` octaves per `config` into a single normalized noise sample.
- `groundFieldFor` (function): function groundFieldFor(world?: WorldFeature): TerrainField тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `hasEnvironmentTerrain` (function): function hasEnvironmentTerrain(world: WorldFeature | undefined): boolean тАФ Whether a world declares real terrain (base heightfield or islands) rather than a flat plane тАФ gates terrain-floor sampling in the movement controllers.
- `heightMapField` (function): function heightMapField(config: HeightMapFieldConfig): TerrainField тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `noiseField` (function): function noiseField(config: NoiseFieldConfig = {}): TerrainField тАФ Builds a `TerrainField` whose height is fractal noise shaped by `config`.
- `resolveEnvironmentField` (function): function resolveEnvironmentField(feature: EnvironmentWorldFeature): TerrainField тАФ The full ground field for an environment world: base `terrain` composed with any `islands`.
- `resolveGroundStep` (function): function resolveGroundStep(field: TerrainField, x: number, z: number, stepX: number, stepZ: number, maxSlope = DEFAULT_MAX_WALK_SLOPE): { stepX: number; stepZ: number } тАФ Zeroes out a movement step's x or z component where it would climb steeper than `maxSlope`.
- `resolveTerrainDetail` (function): function resolveTerrainDetail(config: TerrainDetailConfig, terrainWaterLevel = 0): ResolvedTerrainDetail тАФ Fill a `TerrainDetailConfig` with defaults; `waterLevel` falls back to the terrain's own water level.
- `resolveTerrainField` (function): function resolveTerrainField(descriptor?: TerrainEnvironmentDescriptor): TerrainField тАФ Resolves a `TerrainEnvironmentDescriptor` into a concrete `TerrainField`, applying flatten masks.
- `resolveTerrainPalette` (function): function resolveTerrainPalette(descriptor: Pick<TerrainEnvironmentConfig, "material" | "colors"> = {}): TerrainPalette тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `rollingField` (function): function rollingField(config: RollingFieldConfig = {}): TerrainField тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `sampleSlope` (function): function sampleSlope(field: TerrainField, x: number, z: number): TerrainSlopeSample тАФ Local slope from the field's normal тАФ the input for gravity-roll, ski acceleration, and slide checks (#284.6).
- `seedFrom` (function): function seedFrom(value: string | number | undefined, fallback: number): number тАФ тЪа undocumented
- `slopeForce` (function): function slopeForce(field: TerrainField, x: number, z: number, scale = 9.8): readonly [number, number] тАФ Downhill force/acceleration from the local slope: direction ├Ч sin(slope angle) ├Ч `scale`. Add it to any integrator's XZ velocity each tick (`scale` тЙИ gravity for a free-rolling body).
- `snapEntityToGround` (function): function snapEntityToGround(entities: GroundSnapEntityStore, id: string, field: TerrainField, offset = 0): boolean тАФ Ground-snaps an already-spawned entity in place; returns false when `id` is unknown.
- `snapToGround` (function): function snapToGround(field: TerrainField, position: readonly [number, number, number], offset = 0): [number, number, number] тАФ Returns `position` with `y` replaced by the field's ground height (plus `offset`) at its `x`/`z`.
- `valueNoise` (function): function valueNoise(x: number, z: number, seed: number): number тАФ Smoothly interpolated 2D value noise in `[-1, 1]` for the given seed.
- `withNormal` (function): function withNormal(sampleHeight: (x: number, z: number) => number): TerrainField["sampleNormal"] тАФ Derives a `TerrainField.sampleNormal` from a height sampler via finite-difference gradients.

## @jgengine/core/world/vec2

- `add` (function): function add(a: Vec2, b: Vec2): Vec2 тАФ Sum of two 2D vectors.
- `cross` (function): function cross(a: Vec2, b: Vec2): number тАФ 2D cross product (scalar z of the 3D cross), positive when `b` is counter-clockwise from `a`.
- `distance` (function): function distance(a: Vec2, b: Vec2): number тАФ Distance between two points.
- `distanceSquared` (function): function distanceSquared(a: Vec2, b: Vec2): number тАФ Squared distance between two points; cheaper than `distance` for radius comparisons.
- `dot` (function): function dot(a: Vec2, b: Vec2): number тАФ Dot product of two 2D vectors.
- `fromHeading` (function): function fromHeading(headingRad: number): Vec2 тАФ Unit vector for a heading measured clockwise from +Y (the engine's XZ-plane convention).
- `heading` (function): function heading(a: Vec2): number тАФ Heading in radians of a vector, measured clockwise from +Y to match `fromHeading`.
- `length` (function): function length(a: Vec2): number тАФ Euclidean length of a 2D vector.
- `lengthSquared` (function): function lengthSquared(a: Vec2): number тАФ Squared length of a 2D vector; cheaper than `length` when only comparing magnitudes.
- `lerp` (function): function lerp(a: Vec2, b: Vec2, t: number): Vec2 тАФ Linearly interpolate between points `a` and `b` by fraction `t`.
- `negate` (function): function negate(a: Vec2): Vec2 тАФ Negate a 2D vector.
- `normalize` (function): function normalize(a: Vec2): Vec2 тАФ Unit vector in the direction of `a`; returns the zero vector when `a` has no length.
- `normalizeAngle` (function): function normalizeAngle(angleRad: number): number тАФ Wrap an angle in radians into `[0, 2╧А)`.
- `normalizeAngleDeg` (function): function normalizeAngleDeg(angleDeg: number): number тАФ Wrap an angle in degrees into `[0, 360)`.
- `perp` (function): function perp(a: Vec2): Vec2 тАФ Left-hand perpendicular of `a` (rotated 90┬░ counter-clockwise).
- `reflect` (function): function reflect(v: Vec2, normal: Vec2, restitution = 1): Vec2 тАФ Reflect a velocity off a surface with unit `normal`, losing energy by `restitution` (0..1). At `restitution` 1 the normal component mirrors elastically (`v тИТ 2(v┬╖n)n`); at 0 it is removed so the vector slides along the surface. Only the normal component is scaled тАФ tangential motion is kept тАФ so this is the wall/paddle/boundary bounce every arcade ball game hand-rolls.
- `rotate` (function): function rotate(a: Vec2, radians: number): Vec2 тАФ Rotate a 2D vector by `radians` about the origin.
- `scale` (function): function scale(a: Vec2, s: number): Vec2 тАФ Scale a 2D vector by a scalar.
- `sub` (function): function sub(a: Vec2, b: Vec2): Vec2 тАФ Difference `a - b` of two 2D vectors.

## @jgengine/core/world/vegetation

- `VEGETATION_DEFAULTS` (const): const VEGETATION_DEFAULTS: VegetationSettings тАФ Defaults a bare `kind: "vegetation"` volume grows with: grass at 4 blades/m┬▓.
- `VEGETATION_VOLUME_KIND` (const): const VEGETATION_VOLUME_KIND: "vegetation" тАФ The editor volume kind that marks an area as vegetation fill.
- `VegetationPlacement` (interface): interface VegetationPlacement тАФ One placed vegetation instance тАФ position on the ground plane plus per-instance variation.
- `VegetationSettings` (interface): interface VegetationSettings тАФ How a vegetation volume fills its area, read from the volume's `meta`. `density` is items per square meter тАФ the one slider number: grass blades, trees, bushes, rocks all scale with it. Every field has a default, so a freshly placed `kind: "vegetation"` volume already grows grass.
- `grassPatchesFromVegetation` (function): function grassPatchesFromVegetation(doc: EditorDocument): GrassEnvironmentConfig[] тАФ Grass-blade patches for every `item: "grass"` vegetation volume, ready to spread into `environment()`'s `grass` list тАФ the volume's density number is the blades-per-m┬▓ the shell renders, so the editor slider drives it directly.
- `isVegetationVolume` (function): function isVegetationVolume(volume: EditorVolume): boolean тАФ True when an editor volume is a vegetation fill area.
- `readVegetationSettings` (function): function readVegetationSettings(volume: EditorVolume): VegetationSettings | null тАФ The volume's vegetation settings with defaults filled in; null for non-vegetation volumes.
- `resolveVegetation` (function): function resolveVegetation(doc: EditorDocument): VegetationPlacement[] тАФ All model-item placements in a document (every vegetation volume except `item: "grass"`, which the shell renders as blades тАФ see `grassPatchesFromVegetation`). A game maps each placement's `item` to a mesh/entity via its render catalog and places it grounded.
- `resolveVegetationVolume` (function): function resolveVegetationVolume(volume: EditorVolume): VegetationPlacement[] тАФ Deterministic placements for one vegetation volume: scatter its footprint at `density` items/m┬▓ (respecting `minDistance`), clip round shapes to their radius, and derive per-instance scale/rotation from the volume id + seed, so the same saved scene always grows the same field.
- `vegetationFootprint` (function): function vegetationFootprint(volume: EditorVolume): Aabb тАФ The ground-plane footprint of a volume: box half-extents or sphere/cylinder radius.
